lines.text: Pool Tables | Walt Disney World Resort
Rack ’em up and knock ’em down at complimentary pool tables found at 5 Walt Disney World Resort hotels.

Unleash your inner pool shark with a competitive game of 8-ball or just play for fun. Pool tables at 5 venues allow you to go head to head, practice with a partner or even hone your stick skills solo.

Any Guest of a Walt Disney World Resort hotel may use these pool tables, and equipment can be obtained using a valid Resort ID. Disney Vacation Club members may check out equipment free of charge; for all other Guests, an associated fee applies.
Pool tables are found at the following locations:
Disney’s Animal Kingdom Villas – Kidani Village: Kidani Village Community Hall
Disney’s Beach Club Resort: Stormalong Bay
Disney’s Caribbean Beach Resort: Barefoot Bay Bike Works
Disney’s Old Key West Resort: Conch Flats Community Hall
Disney’s Saratoga Springs Resort & Spa: Saratoga Springs Community Hall.
